positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration featuring a playful group of celestial animals—a crescent moon goat, a shooting star fox, and a nebula otter—intertwining in a cosmic embrace. The style should be modern Nordic folk art meets psychedelic pop. Use a limited, complementary color palette of deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, soft coral, and gold leaf accents. The composition must be perfectly circular and centered, designed to look stunning when printed large on fabric. Emphasize clean, bold silhouettes and high contrast between the subjects and the background. Incorporate subtle geometric patterns (mandala style) into the negative space for depth. High detail, perfect symmetry, suitable for apparel graphic print.
negative: artifacts, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, trademark, copyright, sloppy, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, sketch, realistic photo, signature, messy background
